template.description: Path (experiment-relative, or absolute) to the audit TEMPLATE .py — the percent-format module whose section slugs are the required inventory. Checked for: present, parses via parse_percent_source, and git-committed-clean at that path (an uncommitted/dirty template is an 'unsigned template' NO-GO — the commit IS the signature).
template.title: Template

source_roots.description: Opaque import roots (the linked-sources lint's roots). When omitted AND audit_id names an existing audit, defaults from that audit's recorded configuration (the one-declaration rule); otherwise [].
source_roots.title: Source Roots

input_roots.description: Opaque data-path roots (the executes-live lint's roots). When omitted AND audit_id names an existing audit, defaults from that audit's recorded configuration; otherwise [].
input_roots.title: Input Roots

audit_id.description: The caller-authored audit slug. When it names an existing audit its recorded roots default the roots above, and its journal decides resuming-vs-fresh. Omit for a fresh standalone preflight.
audit_id.title: Audit Id
